text.title: AI Workload Cost Attribution Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply ai-workload-cost-attribution. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Tag at source
step.description: Input: API gateway / SDK. Action: Inject `tenant_id` (and `feature_id`) into every LLM call as OTel attribute.. Output: Tagged spans..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: API gateway / SDK.

step.name: Ingest usage events
step.description: Input: OTel collector + provider usage API. Action: Normalize to canonical schema.. Output: Usage event stream..
step.note: Step 2. Required input: OTel collector + provider usage API.

step.name: Price events
step.description: Input: Usage events + pricing catalogue (versioned). Action: Compute cost-per-call.. Output: Priced events..
step.note: Step 3. Required input: Usage events + pricing catalogue (versioned).

step.name: Rollup
step.description: Input: Priced events. Action: Aggregate by tenant + feature + day.. Output: Rollup table..

step.name: Reconcile
step.description: Input: Rollup + provider invoice. Action: Compute variance; flag if >0.5%.. Output: Reconciled report..
step.note: Step 5. Required input: Rollup + provider invoice.

step.name: Publish
step.description: Input: Reconciled report. Action: Ship to finance + tenant dashboards.. Output: Monthly attribution artefact..
